risk_notes: Finite-cutoff lattice-QED evidence is gauge-audited but not a continuum-limit chemistry claim.

notes: Exact baselines compare against this discretized Hamiltonian, not continuum chemistry.
Gauge links use binary padding with encoded dimension 4.
Pauli decomposition was materialized for this finite Hamiltonian.
Per-group shot estimate derived from precision target 0.01.
Measurement planning reflects the uncompressed execution path.
Particle-number operator expectation is not reconstructed for all mapper/tapering combinations in v1.
Spin-conservation expectation requires a mapped spin operator and is not computed in v1.
Molecular Z2 and point-group reduction are skipped for finite-cutoff lattice-QED field models.
